channel.title: Texas Surveillance Contract Watch
channel.description: Automated public alerts for surveillance tech procurement contracts awarded by Texas municipalities, counties, and state agencies.

item.title: CLEARVIEW AI FEDERAL INVESTIGATOR TOOL + CLOUD DATABASE LOCAL LICENSE SOFTWARE LICENSE
item.description:
Source: USASPENDING

Vendor: CLEARVIEW AI, INC.

Agency: Department of Homeland Security / U.S. Customs and Border Protection → TX

Amount: $15,750.00

Keywords matched: Clearview AI

Description: CLEARVIEW AI FEDERAL INVESTIGATOR TOOL + CLOUD DATABASE LOCAL LICENSE SOFTWARE LICENSE
